source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage/Fire - Talos Energy South Pelto Block 23 Platform D

actions_taken: Dry chemical extinguisher used to extinguish fire
New fire tube fabricated and installed
New burner and fire tube fabricated and tested
Stainless steel heat shroud installed over burners
Operating procedures updated to show high temperature setting
event.summary: At approximately 1000 hours on 8/01/2021, a fire occurred on Talos Energy South Pelto Block 23 Platform D in the Heater Treater (NBK-2900). A Production Operator noticed black smoke from the stack and investigated, discovering a small fire. The operator and PIC shut in the heater treater, turned off gas, opened the front cover hatch, and used a dry chemical extinguisher to extinguish the incipient fire. Upon inspection, a pinhole leak was found in the fire tube. Investigation determined the fire tube was operating at higher temperatures (110-120°F) than designed (maximum 105°F), and paraffin solids had accumulated on the fire tube due to insufficient heat transfer, contributing to the failure. A pattern of similar fires had occurred in 2016 and 2018. Post-incident modifications included installation of a new fire tube, burner, heat shroud, and updated operating procedures.
recommendations: BSEE Houma District has no recommendations to OII at this time

hazards.name: Elevated Temperature in Heater Treater Fire Tube

threats.name: Fire tube operating above design temperature
Paraffin solid formation due to high temperature
Pinhole leak development in fire tube

consequences.name: Property damage to fire tube and equipment

controls.name: Temperature monitoring and manual control
controls.barrier_role: Prevent fire tube from exceeding design temperature
controls.lod_basis: Operational control of burner gas flow

supporting_text: The temperature control for the media was done manually by operators increasing or decreasing gas flow to each burner

normal operating temperatures during the summer is 110-115 degrees Fahrenheit(F) and winter is 115-120 degrees F. However, facility engineering indicated that the maximum operating temperatures should be lower than 105 degrees F

controls.name: Operating procedures for temperature settings
controls.barrier_role: Communicate design temperature limits to operators

supporting_text: The operating high or high-high temperature settings were not indicated on operating procedures posted on the platform
Operating procedures have been updated to show the high temperature setting

controls.name: Fire tube inspection and maintenance
controls.barrier_role: Detect fire tube degradation before failure

supporting_text: A full inspection was completed in April of 2021 of the current fire tube by Oceaneering. There was no evidence of cracks, pitting, or erosion found during this inspection
When the fire tube was removed, 'residual solids' were present on the fire tube. After analysis, it was determined to be paraffin related associated with higher temperatures

controls.name: Fire detection and response
controls.barrier_role: Detect and suppress fire in heater treater
controls.lod_basis: Operator visual inspection and manual fire suppression

supporting_text: While making normal rounds on the platform, a Production Operator noticed black smoke coming from the Heater Treater (NBK-2900) stack
The Operator and PIC turned the gas off, opened the front cover hatch, and utilized one dry chemical extinguisher to put out the incipient fire

controls.name: Heat shroud installation
controls.barrier_role: Prevent direct flame contact with fire tube
controls.lod_basis: Physical barrier to isolate flame from fire tube

supporting_text: A stainless steel heat shroud was installed over both burners to prevent direct contact of the flame to the fire tube

controls.name: Throttle type burner installation
controls.barrier_role: Maintain constant temperature across burner tubes
controls.lod_basis: Equipment design to reduce temperature fluctuations

supporting_text: a new throttle type burner has been installed to keep a more constant temperature across both burner tubes

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
